race.comment: SEETHING CHUCK (3) recorded another minor placing last time out, finishing second after he got back in the run over 1600m at Inverell. Has the ability to take care of this field. MR VILLA (6) started at $10 last time and ran below expectations, finishing a poor thirteenth over 1400m at Taree. This looks easier and assess on earlier efforts. Ideally placed and is sure to play a pivotal role. FARRAIGE (4) built on a nice third two starts back at Goulburn, with a win over 2000m at Taree four days ago. Well placed and is sure to be there at the finish. HIGHLAND HUSTLE (5) produced another moderate effort last start when seventh over 1518m at Coffs Harbour. Finds a nice race and can make amends.
